CONTENT.Early life: Piñeiro attended Escuela Vicálvaro in Spain.
CONTENT.Club career: Piñeiro has been involved with La Liga side Real Madrid first team since 2021.
CONTENT.Style of play: He has been described as "a powerful goalkeeper, with many reflexes, capable of reacting in tenths of seconds to point-blank shots. He also has great positioning".
CONTENT.External links: Real Madrid profileDiego Piñeiro at BDFutbol
CONTENT.International career: Piñeiro was awarded Best Goalkeeper at an under-18 international tournament in France.

SUMMARY: Diego Piñeiro del Álamo (born 13 February 2004) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Real Madrid Castilla.
